This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] PaymentRequest.show() aborts if the document is not active.
  promise_rejects_dom: Inactive document, so must throw InvalidStateError function "function() { throw e; }" threw object "AbortError: Failed to execute 'show' on 'PaymentRequest': Cannot show the payment request" that is not a DOMException InvalidStateError: property "code" is equal to 20, expected 11
[FAIL] PaymentRequest.show() aborts if the document is active, but not fully active.
  promise_rejects_dom: Active, but not fully active, so must throw InvalidStateError function "function() { throw e; }" threw object "AbortError: Failed to execute 'show' on 'PaymentRequest': Cannot show the payment request" that is not a DOMException InvalidStateError: property "code" is equal to 20, expected 11
[FAIL] PaymentRequest.canMakePayment() rejects if the document is not active.
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "UnknownError: Renderer process could not establish or lost IPC connection to the PaymentRequest service in the browser process."
Harness: the test ran to completion.
